SMC SuperFIB

A distributed‑systems solution that synchronises a Pine Script indicator, a PHP/WordPress REST API (source of truth), MT5 Expert Advisors, and a React dashboard.

Engineering Challenges Solved

  • Backend‑as‑source‑of‑truth across 3+ runtimes
  • Broker time normalisation (UTC+2 offset handling)
  • Staleness gates & STALE_HELD blocker logic
  • Cross‑platform parity audits (chop‑threshold drift, HTF bias fixes)
  • Nearest‑minute rounding & cached broker offsets to eliminate jitter
